company.name: Ledgerly
company.one_liner: Automated bank-to-ledger reconciliation for SMB finance teams.

content.note: Diligence: payment-processor dashboard shared on the call shows $0 processed to date. Company is pre-revenue. The deck's '$50k MRR, 40 paying customers' claim is not supported.
Headcount check: LinkedIn and the founder's own answers indicate a team of 2 (Priya + one contract engineer). The deck claims a team of 5.
